Professional.title: Professional
Professional.description: A professional service provider on the platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the professional.

fullName.description: The full name of the professional.

email.description: The email address of the professional.

phone.description: The phone number of the professional.

address.description: The physical address of the professional.

zipcode.description: The zip code of the professional's location.

price.description: The hourly rate or service price.

createdAt.description: The date and time the profile was created.

isVerified.description: Whether the professional has been verified by an admin.
